created_at.description: Timestamp (ISO 8601) when the user object was created.

items_connected.description: Items the user has connected through Link. Typically employers or payroll platforms.

employers_connected.description: Individual employers associated with the connected Items.

external_metadata.description:
Free-text field where additional context for the user can be added.
- Can be any valid JSON, such as a string or object.

Using `external_id` (see below) is recommended when the ability to filter users by an external value is needed.

example.notes: Moved to stage 2 of loan approval.

external_id.description:
Free-text field where [additional context](/overview/data-structure/users#external-identifiers) for the user can be added.
- Can be any string of 100 characters or less.
- Multiple users can have the same `external_id`.

Often used to group users, or associate your internal ID's to users.
- Can be attached to [invites](/console/flows/email-sms-templates#inviting-new-users) or [shareable URLs](/console/flows/shareable-urls#customizations).
- Can be used as a query parameter when [listing users](/api-reference/users#list). (Only exact matches are supported)
- Can be used to search for specific users within the [Connections](https://console.argyle.com/connections) section of Console.
- Will appear on billing CSVs if associated with a user.

phone_number.description: Phone number of the user. E.164 international format.

ssn.description: Social Security number of the user.

city.description: Name of the city, town, district, or similar regional entity.

line1.description: Address-Line 1, usually street address or P.O. Box information.

line2.description: Address-Line 2, usually the apartment or unit number.

state.description: State, county, province, region, or equivalent.

birth_date.description: Date of birth of the user.
